evidence.observed: Original config allowed max_steps=12, no loop guard, no retry, no cache, verbose_system=true, max_completion_tokens=2000.

findings.root_cause: The shipped configuration lets the prompt-driven agent over-call tools and produce long completions, so slow requests can dominate tail latency.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, cache repeated sanitized questions, cap max_steps/tool_budget/completion tokens, and log latency per request in wrapper.py.

evidence.observed: Original config used verbose_system=true, context_size=8, max_completion_tokens=2000, tool_budget=0, cache disabled.

findings.root_cause: Large context and unlimited tool use waste prompt/output tokens even for simple order-total questions.
findings.suggested_fix: Use concise prompt, smaller context, max_completion_tokens=500, tool_budget=4, and cache exact repeated orders.

evidence.observed: Original config had normalize_unicode=false, tool_error_rate=0.18, and catalog_override marking macbook out of stock.

findings.root_cause: Injected tool unreliability and disabled Unicode normalization can make answerable products or cities fail.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate=0, enable retry and normalize_unicode, and remove the catalog override.

evidence.observed: Public questions include customer email text; original prompt and config had no PII protection and redact_pii=false.

findings.root_cause: The agent may echo user contact details in a friendly answer unless the prompt and wrapper forbid it.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt instructs not to repeat PII; config enables redact_pii; wrapper redacts answer text before returning and logs redaction counts.

evidence.observed: Rules state private orders include fake system prices/instructions in order notes; original prompt had no instruction hierarchy.

findings.root_cause: The model can treat customer notes as instructions and use fake prices instead of tool-grounded prices.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt treats notes as data only and requires prices from check_stock; wrapper strips obvious note/instruction suffixes before calling the agent.
